name.en-US: ERS2-CO2 Elsys LoRaWAN CO₂ Room Sensor
name.pt-BR: ERS2-CO2 Sensor de Ambiente com CO₂ LoRaWAN Elsys

description.en-US: Elsys ERS2-CO2 — LoRaWAN (Class A) indoor sensor that monitors temperature, humidity, light, motion and CO₂. Uplinks are Elsys TLV frames on FPort 5.
description.pt-BR: Elsys ERS2-CO2 — sensor LoRaWAN (Classe A) de ambiente interno que monitora temperatura, umidade, luz, movimento e CO₂. Os uplinks são quadros TLV Elsys no FPort 5.
